# gb-ch01 — Great Books #1: Secrets of the Universe (outline)

## Working spine

1. **Course promise** — Great books, full humanity, secrets of universe and self (`clm-0043`).
2. **Contrast with school story** — Materialism / evolution framing vs consciousness and soul (book: label as pedagogy).
3. **Scaffold stack** — Kant gloss, hemispheres, vibration/monad, cave → media/AI/school (`clm-0044`).
4. **Paths out** — Meditation, religious parallels, “hacks,” Christ consciousness, collective imagination (lecture voice; see `clm-0043`).
5. **Canon as vessel** — Immortality / reincarnation / godhood via Homer, Plato, Dante, etc.; semester plan (`clm-0045`).
6. **Reader guardrail** — Science/spirit boundary for public copy (`clm-0046`).
